text:
/ci1 2 っ！　こっち！　いやあっち！？
ああもうっ、なんなのよこの動き！

/ci1 2 どうせ見えないんだ、目で追うな！
攻撃の終わった隙を狙え！

/ci1 2 Here! No--over there!?
Argh, what is UP with this freaky speed!?

/ci1 2 If you can't see 'em anyway, don't
bother tracking with your eyes! Just wait for a
break in the assault--that's your opening!

っ！　こっち！　いやあっち！？
ああもうっ、なんなのよこの動き！

どうせ見えないんだ、目で追うな！
攻撃の終わった隙を狙え！

Here! No--over there!?
Argh, what is UP with this freaky speed!?

If you can't see 'em anyway, don't bother
tracking with your eyes! Just wait for a break
in the assault--that's your opening!
